description_long: This house complex features a grand central building with two prominent towers and red-tiled gable roofs, flanked by symmetrical wings and surrounded by lush landscaping. The main structure is set back from a wide street, with two smaller outbuildings at the front corners, each with matching red-tiled roofs and arched windows. The central courtyard is landscaped with trees, shrubs, and pathways, creating a formal garden atmosphere. The buildings are primarily white with red roof accents and classical architectural details such as columns and arched entryways. The layout is highly symmetrical, with paved walkways and driveways leading to the main entrance. The overall design evokes a Mediterranean or Spanish Colonial Revival style, emphasizing grandeur and formality.
description: A grand, symmetrical house complex with red-tiled roofs, white walls, twin towers, and lush landscaped courtyards, evoking a Mediterranean or Spanish Colonial Revival style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, twin towers, symmetrical outbuildings, and landscaped courtyard facing the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the central building, the garden layout, and the arrangement of the outbuildings along the street.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the main house, enclosed courtyard, and the symmetry of the overall layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garden, the rear of the outbuildings, and the relationship between the main house and its surroundings.
attribute_entryway_design: Grand arched entryway with columns, steps, and decorative landscaping, flanked by symmetrical outbuildings and a formal courtyard.
